name: @firstpick/pi-skill-server-audit
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for Linux server security reviews, SSH hardening, firewall/open-port audits, user/permission checks, exposed services, or host hardening requests. Produces severity-rated findings and practical remediation steps.
description_zh: 代理应调用此技能进行 Linux 服务器安全审查、SSH 强化、防火墙/开放端口审计、用户/权限检查、暴露服务或主机强化请求。生成严重性评级的结果和实用的修复步骤
